evaluation_scope: AEM-EVOLVE HITL enforcement — controlled environment — EthicBit / CEMU v3.7.0+
hitl_mechanism: Dual-path HITL: HMAC hex token or OIDC RS256 JWT. Format auto-detected at POST /approve endpoint.

hitl_decision_record.rationale: AI-ME v3.1 evidence execution — all 12 gate artifacts produced, hash-verified, and constitutionally compliant

fast_path_enforcement: HITL requirement enforced pre-emission — Fast Path BLOCK if HITL not cleared for high-risk output
known_limitations: HITL signing key is file-based, not HSM-backed
HITL token is a shared HMAC key, not enterprise IAM
JWKS served in-process, not a real OIDC provider endpoint
